'''鈭歷-b-n-dh''' ('''kavabnedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chat|chat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chat|chat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-b-n-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kavabnedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivabnedhoko|thivabnedhoko]] || [[word:jivabnedhoko|jivabnedhoko]] || [[word:shivabnedhoko|shivabnedhoko]] || [[word:kivabnedhoko|kivabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvabnedhoko|thuthuvabnedhoko]] || [[word:jujuvabnedhoko|jujuvabnedhoko]] || [[word:shushuvabnedhoko|shushuvabnedhoko]] || [[word:kukuvabnedhoko|kukuvabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvabnedhoko|thuvabnedhoko]] || [[word:juvabnedhoko|juvabnedhoko]] || [[word:shuvabnedhoko|shuvabnedhoko]] || [[word:kuvabnedhoko|kuvabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvabnedhoko|thuvabnedhoko]] || [[word:juvabnedhoko|juvabnedhoko]] || [[word:shuvabnedhoko|shuvabnedhoko]] || [[word:kuvabnedhoko|kuvabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevabnedhoko|thevabnedhoko]] || [[word:jevabnedhoko|jevabnedhoko]] || [[word:shevabnedhoko|shevabnedhoko]] || [[word:kevabnedhoko|kevabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovabnedhoko|thothovabnedhoko]] || [[word:jojovabnedhoko|jojovabnedhoko]] || [[word:shoshovabnedhoko|shoshovabnedhoko]] || [[word:kokovabnedhoko|kokovabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovabnedhoko|thovabnedhoko]] || [[word:jovabnedhoko|jovabnedhoko]] || [[word:shovabnedhoko|shovabnedhoko]] || [[word:kovabnedhoko|kovabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovabnedhoko|thovabnedhoko]] || [[word:jovabnedhoko|jovabnedhoko]] || [[word:shovabnedhoko|shovabnedhoko]] || [[word:kovabnedhoko|kovabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vabnedhoko|th忙vabnedhoko]] || [[word:j忙vabnedhoko|j忙vabnedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙vabnedhoko|sh忙vabnedhoko]] || [[word:k忙vabnedhoko|k忙vabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavabnedhoko|thathavabnedhoko]] || [[word:jajavabnedhoko|jajavabnedhoko]] || [[word:shashavabnedhoko|shashavabnedhoko]] || [[word:kakavabnedhoko|kakavabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavabnedhoko|thavabnedhoko]] || [[word:javabnedhoko|javabnedhoko]] || [[word:shavabnedhoko|shavabnedhoko]] || [[word:kavabnedhoko|kavabnedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavabnedhoko|thavabnedhoko]] || [[word:javabnedhoko|javabnedhoko]] || [[word:shavabnedhoko|shavabnedhoko]] || [[word:kavabnedhoko|kavabnedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
